name: Crab Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Stir in the minced green onions and cook until fragrant.
3. Add the crab meat and season with salt and white pepper to taste.
4. If using garlic powder, add it at this stage.
5. Pour in the dry vermouth and stir quickly until the liquid is almost evaporated.
6. Remove from heat and transfer the mixture to a bowl.
